scripts.dev: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:web
scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp/tsconfig.json && bun run --cwd apps/web check
